violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as shell eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as vegetables and prepared foods) in the 2-door reach-in. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Eggs were moved during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025

Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods in the 2-door reach-in. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Eggs must be moved to the bottom shelf. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2024

Pulled chicken/pork and salad observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. TCS foods are only safe for 7 days, including the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2024
